reviews.review_description: The graphics and details are really good and gameplay as well. but if possible please add rotation to the gear vr controller its very important for those who don't have swivel chairs.

developer_response.body:
Nice to see your feedback :)
Thanks for suggestion, we will be thinking about your idea,
Regards!

reviews.review_description: Beautiful graphics that 'll always be up-to-date, light, music and mechanics - something I haven't seen before in other games! but... be careful, because it is not an easy game. it draws in.

This game is simply amazing. The graphics are a perfect 8-bit style, and you can loot! The only thing I would want the developers to change is the length of this game. There’s only one boss after 30 min of shooting robots, and that’s it. I finished the game the same day I bought it. Anyways, it’s still worth it in May 2020!!!
Really cool game. I wish it was longer. I didn't expect it to get as challenging as it did. It was a very pleasant surprise. Thanks developers.
